description_long: This object is a modern electric guitar with a striking, angular body design and a long, slender neck. The body features a dark, almost black finish with subtle marbling and a geometric, polygonal lower section. The neck is a deep blue with several parallel, light green lines running its length, giving it a futuristic appearance. At the base of the body, there is a small, faceted, metallic element resembling a decorative knob or inlay. The headstock is sharply contoured and appears to have a row of tuning pegs along one edge, though fine details are not fully visible. The overall design is unconventional and visually bold, likely intended to stand out in urban or performance settings.
description: A modern electric guitar with an angular, dark body, blue neck with green lines, and a faceted metallic detail at the base. The design is futuristic and visually striking.
description_view_0: The guitar is seen edge-on, highlighting its thin profile and the sharp, angular contours of the body and neck.
description_view_1: This view shows the top of the guitar, revealing the dark marbled body, blue neck with green lines, and the faceted metallic detail at the base.
description_view_2: A top-down perspective emphasizes the geometric body shape and the alignment of the neck with its parallel green lines.
description_view_3: The back of the guitar is visible, showing the angular body and the transition to the blue neck, with less detail on the headstock.
